svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="2" border="20"> <diagram name="Pipeline Overview" id="overview1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1429" dy="1277" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=28;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#64748B;" value="MLB Payroll Efficiency Data Pipeline (2021–2025)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="1320" x="40" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col1Hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=18;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#64748B;" value="Sources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="240" x="40" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col2Hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=18;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#64748B;" value="Extract" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="240" x="320" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col3Hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=18;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#64748B;" value="Local Data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="240" x="600" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col4Hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=18;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#64748B;" value="Cloud Load" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="240" x="880" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col5Hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=18;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#64748B;" value="Transform + Serve" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="240" x="1160" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#64748B;spacing=12;" value="Fangraphs Payroll (.xlsx)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#64748B;spacing=12;" value="Fangraphs Stats via pybaseball
(legacy / best-effort)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="240" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#10B981;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#10B981;spacing=12;" value="parse_payroll.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="320" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#10B981;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#10B981;spacing=12;" value="fetch_player_stats.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="320" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontColor=#64748B;" value="May return HTTP 403" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="320" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="local1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#A78BFA;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#A78BFA;spacing=12;" value="Parquet snapshots
(canonical for analysis)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="600" y="232" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="badge1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=40;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#A78BFA;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontColor=#64748B;spacing=8;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;" value="★ Source of truth in archival mode" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="240" x="600" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloud1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#A78BFA;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#A78BFA;spacing=12;" value="AWS S3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="880" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloud2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#A78BFA;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#A78BFA;spacing=12;" value="Snowflake RAW
(COPY INTO)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="240" x="880" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ts1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#10B981;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=4;fontColor=#10B981;spacing=12;" value="dbt staging + marts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="1160" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ts2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3B82F6;strokeColor=#3B82F6;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=5;fontColor=#FFFFFF;spacing=12;" value="Streamlit dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="1160" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="badge2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=40;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#3B82F6;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontColor=#64748B;spacing=8;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;" value="↦ Outputs: team efficiency, player value" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="240" x="1160" y="358" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="src1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="ex1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="src2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 4;" target="ex2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ex1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="local1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ex2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="local1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="local1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="cloud1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="cloud1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="cloud2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="cloud2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="ts1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="ts1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="ts2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
